next_actions: do_not_convert exposed topdeck probes into cuts
route mana learning through dedicated Plateau pairs instead of generic basic-land probes
require matrix, trace, and equal battle gates before any deck change
decision.reason: Current probe cuts have real exposure or structural mana-floor risk. The only narrower advancement is the dedicated mana-base model's diagnostic Plateau pairs, still with battle and promotion closed.
